fields.label: Webhook Name
fields.description: Unique name for this webhook configuration

fields.label: Webhook URL
fields.description: The URL to send webhook payloads to

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this webhook

fields.label: HTTP Method
fields.description: HTTP method to use for webhook requests

fields.label: Content Type
fields.description: Content-Type header for webhook requests

fields.label: Product Created
fields.description: Trigger webhook when a product is created

fields.label: Product Updated
fields.description: Trigger webhook when a product is updated

fields.label: Product Deleted
fields.description: Trigger webhook when a product is deleted

fields.label: Product Published
fields.description: Trigger webhook when a product is published to a channel

fields.label: Product Unpublished
fields.description: Trigger webhook when a product is unpublished

fields.label: Asset Created
fields.description: Trigger webhook when a digital asset is created

fields.label: Golden Record Merged
fields.description: Trigger webhook when records are merged into a golden record

fields.label: Taxonomy Changed
fields.description: Trigger webhook when taxonomy classifications change

fields.label: Custom Events
fields.description: Trigger webhook for custom events specified in event_types

fields.label: Custom Event Types
fields.description: Comma-separated list of custom event type codes to trigger on

fields.label: Filter by Channel
fields.description: Only trigger for events related to specific channels

fields.label: Channels
fields.description: Comma-separated list of channel codes to filter on

fields.label: Filter by Product Type
fields.description: Only trigger for events related to specific product types

fields.label: Product Types
fields.description: Comma-separated list of product type codes to filter on

fields.label: Filter by Product Family
fields.description: Only trigger for events related to specific product families

fields.label: Product Families
fields.description: Comma-separated list of product family codes to filter on

fields.label: Authentication Type
fields.options:
None
API Key
Bearer Token
Basic Auth
HMAC Signature
fields.description: Method to authenticate webhook requests

fields.label: API Key Header Name
fields.description: Header name for API key (e.g., X-API-Key, Authorization)

fields.label: API Key / Token
fields.description: API key or bearer token (stored encrypted)

fields.label: Username
fields.description: Username for Basic Authentication

fields.label: Password
fields.description: Password for Basic Authentication (stored encrypted)

fields.label: HMAC Secret
fields.description: Secret key for HMAC signature generation (stored encrypted)

fields.label: HMAC Algorithm
fields.description: Hash algorithm for HMAC signature

fields.label: HMAC Header Name
fields.description: Header name for HMAC signature

fields.label: Custom Headers
fields.description: JSON object of custom headers to include in webhook requests. Example: {"X-Custom-Header": "value"}

fields.label: Payload Format
fields.options:
Standard
Custom Template
Raw Event Data
fields.description: How to format the webhook payload

fields.label: Include Full Document
fields.description: Include the full document data in the payload

fields.label: Include Changed Fields Only
fields.description: For update events, only include fields that changed

fields.label: Include Metadata
fields.description: Include event metadata (timestamp, event type, user, etc.)

fields.label: Include Related Data
fields.description: Include related data (attributes, classifications, assets)

fields.label: Payload Template
fields.description: Jinja2 template for custom payload format. Available variables: event, document, user, timestamp

fields.label: Max Retries
fields.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed deliveries

fields.label: Retry Strategy
fields.options:
Exponential Backoff
Linear Backoff
Fixed Interval
fields.description: Strategy for timing retry attempts

fields.label: Initial Retry Delay (seconds)
fields.description: Delay before first retry attempt

fields.label: Max Retry Delay (seconds)
fields.description: Maximum delay between retries (for exponential backoff)

fields.label: Backoff Multiplier
fields.description: Multiplier for exponential backoff (e.g., 2.0 means delays double each retry)

fields.label: Request Timeout (seconds)
fields.description: Timeout for webhook HTTP requests

fields.label: Retry on Status Codes
fields.description: Comma-separated HTTP status codes that should trigger retry

fields.label: Success Status Codes
fields.description: Comma-separated HTTP status codes considered successful

fields.label: Disable After Consecutive Failures
fields.description: Automatically disable webhook after this many consecutive failures (0 to disable)

fields.label: Send Alert on Failure
fields.description: Send notification when webhook delivery fails

fields.label: Alert Email
fields.description: Email address to send failure alerts to

fields.label: Total Deliveries
fields.description: Total number of webhook delivery attempts

fields.label: Successful Deliveries
fields.description: Number of successful webhook deliveries

fields.label: Failed Deliveries
fields.description: Number of failed webhook deliveries

fields.label: Consecutive Failures
fields.description: Current count of consecutive failures

fields.label: Success Rate
fields.description: Percentage of successful deliveries

fields.label: Avg Response Time (ms)
fields.description: Average response time for successful deliveries

fields.label: Last Delivery At
fields.description: Timestamp of last delivery attempt

fields.label: Last Delivery Status
fields.description: Status of last delivery attempt

fields.label: Last Status Code
fields.description: HTTP status code from last delivery attempt

fields.label: Last Response Time (ms)
fields.description: Response time from last delivery attempt

fields.label: Last Error Message
fields.description: Error message from last failed delivery

fields.label: Last Event ID
fields.description: ID of the last event that triggered this webhook

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description and notes about this webhook configuration
